# Nuxt AI Images

> Minimal Nuxt 4 + Nuxt UI template for AI image generation products. Use it as an anchor repo when starting new OpenAI or Google image pipelines.

## What it is

- File-based routes: `/` (landing), `/dashboard` (studio), `/dashboard/settings`.
- Demo-safe server route `POST /api/generate-image` — placeholder image when `NUXT_PUBLIC_IMAGE_GEN_DEMO=true`.
- Pinia store `useStudioStore`, composable `useGenerateImage`.
- Dashboard shell: `USidebar`, `UCard`, `UForm`, tokens (`text-highlighted`, `bg-default`, etc.).

## Key files

- `docs/DECISIONS.md` — rationale for stack, demo mode, route naming, and docs split
- `app/pages/dashboard/(studio).vue` — studio UI
- `server/api/generate-image.post.ts` — implement OpenAI or Google SDKs here
- `docs/IMAGE_PIPELINE.md` — wiring guide
- `docs/PERFORMANCE.md` — budgets and Core Web Vitals habits
- `docs/AI_SEO.md` — llms.txt, structured pages, citations

## Links

- [Nuxt UI](https://ui.nuxt.com/)
- [Nuxt](https://nuxt.com/)
- [VueUse Motion](https://motion.vueuse.org/)

## Contact / customization

Fork this template and replace branding (`AppLogo`, `app.config.ts` colors, copy on landing and dashboard).
